Package emissary.util.io

Class DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder

  • java.lang.Object
    • emissary.util.io.DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder
  • Enclosing class:
    DiskSpaceMonitor
    public static class DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder
extends Object
    Builder for creating DiskSpaceMonitor instances.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Builder​(Path monitoredPath)
      Creates a new Builder for the specified path.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      DiskSpaceMonitor build()
      Builds and returns a DiskSpaceMonitor instance.
      DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder checkInterval​(long seconds)
      Sets the check interval in seconds.
      DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder pauseThresholdBytes​(long bytes)
      Sets the absolute free space threshold for pausing.
      DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder pauseThresholdPercent​(double percent)
      Sets the percentage threshold for pausing.
      DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder resumeThresholdBytes​(long bytes)
      Sets the absolute free space threshold for resuming.
      DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder resumeThresholdPercent​(double percent)
      Sets the percentage threshold for resuming.

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Builder

        public Builder​(Path monitoredPath)
        Creates a new Builder for the specified path.
        Parameters:
        monitoredPath - the filesystem path to monitor

    • Method Detail

      • checkInterval

        public DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder checkInterval​(long seconds)
        Sets the check interval in seconds.
        Parameters:
        seconds - the interval between disk space checks (must be > 0)
        Returns:
        this builder

      • pauseThresholdPercent

        public DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder pauseThresholdPercent​(double percent)
        Sets the percentage threshold for pausing.
        Parameters:
        percent - the disk usage percentage (0-100) at which to pause
        Returns:
        this builder

      • resumeThresholdPercent

        public DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder resumeThresholdPercent​(double percent)
        Sets the percentage threshold for resuming.
        Parameters:
        percent - the disk usage percentage (0-100) at which to resume
        Returns:
        this builder

      • pauseThresholdBytes

        public DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder pauseThresholdBytes​(long bytes)
        Sets the absolute free space threshold for pausing.
        Parameters:
        bytes - the minimum free bytes at which to pause
        Returns:
        this builder

      • resumeThresholdBytes

        public DiskSpaceMonitor.Builder resumeThresholdBytes​(long bytes)
        Sets the absolute free space threshold for resuming.
        Parameters:
        bytes - the minimum free bytes at which to resume
        Returns:
        this builder

      • build

        public DiskSpaceMonitor build()
        Builds and returns a DiskSpaceMonitor instance.
        Returns:
        the configured DiskSpaceMonitor
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if configuration is invalid
